1.title: Vision & Personas
1.instruction: Describe the primary customer types (busy families, health-focused singles, beginners) and their goals. Capture success metrics (on-time delivery, low churn, high recipe rating) and dietary inclusions/exclusions.

2.title: Meal Plan Catalog Rules
2.instruction: Define the catalog of plans (meals per week, servings per meal), dietary tags (vegan, low-carb), seasonal rotations, add-ons (desserts, snacks), and pricing tiers by plan size.

3.title: Subscription & Checkout Flow
3.instruction: Outline how a customer selects a plan, sets delivery frequency, chooses delivery windows, enters addresses, and pays. Include trial rules, discounts, taxes/shipping handling, and confirmation messaging.

4.title: Delivery & Packaging Policies
4.instruction: Specify service areas, cut-off times for weekly order changes, handling for skipped weeks, packaging preferences (recyclable, cold chain), and how failed deliveries or reschedules are handled.

5.title: Notifications & Support
5.instruction: Define notifications (order confirmation, shipment, delivery ETA, delivery issues), preferred channels (email/SMS/app), and how customers contact support for refunds, substitutions, or dietary issues.
